body_key.description: The key for a localized notification body

body_params.description: The array of values to replace placeholders in the localized body

title_key.description: The key for a localized notification title

title_params.description: The array of values to replace placeholders in the localized title

subtitle_key.description: The key for a localized notification subtitle

subtitle_params.description: The array of values to replace placeholders in the localized subtitle

thread_id.description: The app-specific identifier for grouping related notifications

badge.description: The value to set the home screen app icon badge to. `0` removes the badge

call_id.description: (Legacy) The call ID for a call notification

category.description: The app-specific type of notification, which corresponds to a pre-registered `UNNotificationCategory` on iOS or an intent filter launched on click on Android

collapse_id.description: Coalesce multiple notifications matching the same ID into one

content_available.description: Specify `true` to deliver the notification as a silent background update on iOS

content_mutable.description: Specify `true` to allow a notification service app extension on iOS to modify the notification's content before delivery

data.description: The custom data to include in the notification

channel_id.description: The pre-registered notification channel to associate the notification with

color.description: The color, expressed in `#rrggbb` format, of the notification

icon.description: The name of a drawable resource to use as the notification's icon

tag.description: Replace existing notifications in the notification drawer that have the same tag

sound.description: The name of a sound file to play when the device receives the notification

ttl.description: The duration (in seconds) for which notification delivery should be retried if it fails
